title: loranthus kingii
intro: Loranthus kingii, also known as the King's lichen or King's flower, is a hemiparasitic plant native to Australia, which obtains some of its nutrients by parasitizing other plants. It has been traditionally used in Western herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Loranthus kingii include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatic pain, and treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation. Loranthus kingii can be prepared as a decoction, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
